ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "artist_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "artist_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_influence" TEXT /* Brief description of the artist's influence */,
  "artist_school" TEXT /* Art school or movement associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artwork */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of artwork (e.g., painting, sculpture) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used to create the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "artwork_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the artwork */,
  "artwork_status" TEXT /* Current status of the artwork (e.g., on display, in storage, on loan) */,
  "artwork_location" TEXT /* Current location of the artwork (e.g., gallery name, storage facility) */,
  "artwork_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the artwork */,
  "artwork_inspiration" TEXT /* Brief description of the inspiration behind the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_images_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the credit belongs to */,
  "credit_text" TEXT /* Credit text for the artwork */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., museum, gallery, private collection) */,
  "credit_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technique */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who uses the technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique */,
  "technique_origin" TEXT /* Origin or history of the technique */,
  "technique_prevalence" TEXT /* How commonly the technique is used by the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_techniques" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technique used for the artwork */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Brief description of how the technique was used in the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id", "technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the color belongs to */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  "color_usage" TEXT /* Brief description of how the color is used in the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the event belongs to */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., exhibition, sale) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the location of the event */,
  "event_curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator responsible for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_history_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, administrator) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the artwork */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "log_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork exhibited */,
  "exhibition_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_date" TEXT /* Date of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_location" TEXT /* Location of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor of the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork conserved */,
  "conservation_date" TEXT /* Date of conservation */,
  "conservation_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation (e.g., restoration, cleaning) */,
  "conservation_description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation process */,
  "conservation_cost" REAL /* Cost of the conservation */,
  "conservation_team" TEXT /* Names of the team members involved in the conservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_records_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)
